prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为8278→8528→8329→8660→8721名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约392名；2025年基准位次约8721名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021年117人、2022年116人、2023年117人、2024年142人、2025年149人，逐年扩招趋势明显；2026年计划150人，较 2025年微增1人，扩招幅度极小，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京化工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，理工类；软科中国大学排名2021年第62名→2022年第64名→20 23年第64名→2024年第68名→2025年第63名→2026年第57名，近年排名稳步上升，2026年创历史新高，反映学校综合实力持续提升；2024年高考周期声誉评价为中 性/混合，涉及教师师德调查但无重大负面舆情；2025及2026年周期未出现显著声誉事件；历史投档异常记录中未见北京化工大学断档信号，整 体报考心理环境平稳；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A、化学获评A-、材料科学与工程获评A-，共3个A-及以上学科；化学工程与技术为学校王牌学科 ，与招生专业中的工科试验班（化工能源与生物医药、宏德书院等）高度对应，对相关方向考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 化工、材料等传统工科专业社会热度总体 平稳，计算机类、自动化类等热门工科专业报考热度较高；北京市2026年高考报名人数约84,900人，较2025年65,434人大幅增长约29.7%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧；北京化工大学位于北京市，为本省高校；该校在北京市招生计划占比较高（2025年约149人），对本市考生具有天然的地域偏好优 势，本地考生报考意愿通常较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次8721名、2026年计划微扩1人（扩幅约0.67%）、北京市考生总数大幅增长约29.7%导致竞争加剧、学校软 科排名升至历史最高第57名等关键因素，考虑考生规模激增的竞争压力，预测2026年最低录取位次前移至约8676名，较2025年小幅提升约45名；位次区 间为8176–9176名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（宏德书院）
- 化学（基础拔尖）
- 材料科学与工程（材料、大数据双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（化工能源与生物医药）
- 工科试验班（先进材料）
- 计算机类
- 自动化类
- 化学工程与工艺（化工、大数据双学士学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（高端装备与智能制造）
- 理科试验班（数学、物理电子与管理）
- 工商管理类（新文科经管法）
- 英语。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间8176–9176名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业可冲刺、三档专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<8176名）可重点冲击宏德书院、基础拔尖班 等一档专业；位次接近区间上限（>9176名）建议以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for comprehensive subjects in Beijing were 8278 → 8528 → 8329 → 8660 → 8721, showing a fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 392 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 8721; the enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects at this university in Beijing was 117 in 2021, 116 in 2022, 117 in 2023, 142 in 2024, and 149 in 2025, showing a clear trend of gradual expansion; the 2026 plan is 150, a slight increase of 1 compared to 2025, with a very small expansion rate, having limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Chemical Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, focusing on science and engineering; its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings was 62nd in 2021 → 64th in 2022 → 64th in 2023 → 68th in 2024 → 63rd in 2025 → 57th in 2026, showing a steady rise in recent years, reaching a historic high in 2026, reflecting the continuous improvement of the university's overall strength; the reputation evaluation during the 2024 college entrance examination cycle was neutral/mixed, involving a teacher ethics survey but no major negative public opinion; no significant reputation events occurred in the 2025 and 2026 cycles; no signs of a gap in historical admission anomalies for Beijing University of Chemical Technology were found, and the overall application psychological environment is stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A, Chemistry was rated A-, and Materials Science and Engineering was rated A-, totaling 3 disciplines rated A- or above; Chemical Engineering and Technology is the university's flagship discipline, highly corresponding to the engineering experimental classes (Chemical Energy and Biomedicine, Hongde Academy, etc.) in the enrollment majors, strongly attracting candidates in related directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of traditional engineering majors such as chemical engineering and materials is generally stable, while popular engineering majors like computer science and automation have high application enthusiasm; the number of college entrance examination applicants in Beijing in 2026 is about 84,900, a significant increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, leading to a substantial expansion of the candidate pool and intensified competition; Beijing University of Chemical Technology is located in Beijing, a local university; its enrollment plan in Beijing accounts for a relatively high proportion (about 149 in 2025), giving it a natural regional preference advantage for local candidates, who usually have a strong willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering key factors such as the baseline ranking of 8721 in 2025, a slight expansion of 1 place in the 2026 plan (an expansion rate of about 0.67%), a significant increase of about 29.7% in the total number of candidates in Beijing leading to intensified competition, and the university's Soft Science ranking rising to a historic high of 57th, and taking into account the competitive pressure from the surge in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 8676, a slight improvement of about 45 places compared to 2025; the ranking range is 8176–9176.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Hongde Academy)
- Chemistry (Basic Top-Notch)
- Materials Science and Engineering (Materials, Big Data Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Chemical Energy and Biomedicine)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Advanced Materials)
- Computer Class
- Automation Class
- Chemical Engineering and Technology (Chemical Engineering, Big Data Dual Degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics, Physics Electronics and Management)
- Business Administration Class (New Liberal Arts, Economics, Management, Law)
- English.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8176–9176, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 flagship majors as a reach, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<8176), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors such as Hongde Academy and Basic Top-Notch Class; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>9176), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with lower rankings.
